reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio demasiada pequeña para ser de un ACA y en una zona muy poblada y de paso. Atención aceptable en las islas de combustible, aunque en mi caso, no se me ofreció ningún servicio accesorio. Amabilidad; 5 puntos

(Translated by Google)
The service station was too small for an ACA station, especially considering its location in a busy, populated area. Service at the pumps was acceptable, although I wasn't offered any additional services. Friendliness: 5 out of 5
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMnNqXzRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tardan mucho en atender ,está bien ubicado pero casi siempre es larga la fila para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
They take a long time to serve you; it's well located, but the line to get fuel is almost always long.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Y buena recomposición del chico q nos atendió y nos asesor sobre un tema mecánico
Lastima no saber su nombre
Gracias

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. And great feedback from the young man who helped us and advised us on a mechanical issue. It's a shame we don't know his name. Thank you.

reviews.comment:
son muy amables al atender pero es muy lento todo el servicio. lunes al mediodia espere 50 minutos para despacho de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
They are very friendly when assisting, but the whole service is very slow. On Monday at noon, I waited 50 minutes for fuel.
